settings.heading: Count Every Rakaat with Intention
settings.text: A beautifully crafted prayer counter designed to help you stay present and mindful in every moment of worship.

settings.heading: Smart Sensor Technology
settings.text: A precision capacitive sensor detects each press instantly — no mechanical click, no missed counts.

settings.heading: Silent & Discreet
settings.text: The sensor operates without sound, keeping your focus on worship without disturbing those around you.

settings.heading: Reliable Every Time
settings.text: Engineered to register every touch accurately — even through light fabric — so you never lose your count.

settings.heading: Engineered for Precision Worship
settings.text: Beneath the Rakaat Counter's timeless exterior lies a capacitive touch sensor engineered for absolute reliability. Whether you are in sujood or standing, every rakaat registers — quietly, accurately, every time.

settings.quote: This rakaat counter has completely transformed my prayer experience. The quality is exceptional and the click is so satisfying. I no longer lose count mid-salah.
Beautiful craftsmanship. I bought one for myself and gifted two to family members. Everyone loves it. Worth every penny.
Simple, elegant, and exactly what I needed. The feel in the hand is perfect — it never slips during sujood.

settings.heading: Loved by the Community
settings.subheading: Trusted by thousands of Muslims around the world
